title: Ships Purchased
query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT StoreShipID || '-' || MarketID) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(ShipPrice), 0) AS spend FROM ShipyardBuy WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(ShipType_Localised, ShipType) AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT StoreShipID || '-' || MarketID) AS value FROM ShipyardBuy WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY ShipType ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {total} ship(s) purchased totalling {spend} Cr during the report period. Every ship purchase is a career decision — an Anaconda says endgame multi-role operator, a Krait Phantom says dedicated explorer, a Vulture says committed bounty hunter. The purchase history reads like a commander progression arc.
details.help: ShipyardBuy ShipType_Localised is the ship class. total drives the title as the fleet acquisition count.

tagLines: Shipyard purchase records compiled. Hull acquisition log noted in the fleet management record.
Every ship you bought was the right ship at the time. The list shows how that reasoning evolved.
The ships you bought tell your story better than the ones you kept.
